content.speakerText: Do you smoke or drink much?
expectedAnswers: I don't smoke. I have a glass of wine on weekends.
I used to smoke, but I quit two years ago. I rarely drink — maybe once a month.
Nah, I'm not a smoker. I only have a beer when I'm out with friends.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回答了是否吸烟和饮酒
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的时态和频率副词
表达自然度：使用了口语化表达如 'Nah' 或 'a glass of wine'，符合日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：包含 'smoke', 'drink', 'quit', 'weekends/monthly' 等场景关键词

expectedAnswers: I'm allergic to peanuts. No chronic conditions.
Yes, I get rashes from penicillin — that's it.
I have asthma since childhood, but it's well-managed with medication.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰说明过敏原或慢性病情况
语言准确性：使用了正确术语如 'allergic to', 'chronic conditions', 'well-managed'
表达自然度：使用了口语化结构如 'that's it' 或 'I get rashes from'，不生硬
关键词覆盖：包含 'allergic', 'penicillin', 'asthma', 'chronic' 等核心医疗词汇
